items.title: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
items.dek: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.
items.body: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
items.dek: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.
items.body: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.
